description_long: This is a heavily armored, tracked combat vehicle resembling a World War II-era tank, painted in a dark green color. The vehicle features a large, cylindrical main cannon mounted on a rotating turret, with additional cylindrical objects, likely spare fuel tanks or storage canisters, attached to the turret's rear. The hull is robust, with visible rivets and reinforced armor plating covering the front, sides, and turret. The tracks are wide and rugged, designed for traversing rough terrain, and the suspension system is partially visible beneath the side armor. The vehicle also has a long radio antenna extending from the turret, and various storage compartments and equipment are mounted externally.
description: A dark green, heavily armored tracked tank with a large turret-mounted cannon, external storage canisters, and a long radio antenna.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick frontal armor, main cannon barrel, and the prominent radio antenna extending upward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cylindrical storage canisters on the turret, side armor, and the full length of the tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view of the turret and hull, with the main cannon facing forward and the rear-mounted storage canisters visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the side armor, track system, and the external equipment mounted on the hull.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with reinforced, sloped panels on the front, sides, and turret; appears thick and robust.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green paint with no visible camouflage pattern.
